segments.text: Today you have arranged this worship of your guru. That is, Your Mother!
Perhaps You are very unique people that has a Guru who Is A Mother
Why This Pooja is Arranged?
One Has to know it's very important for every disciple
to worship the guru. But a guru has
be real guru, not one who is just
exploiting disciples and he's not authorized by God
The puja arranged because
you have been initiated into the statutes of
Lord You've being told what are
dharmas for human beings? For that
Actually, you need not have a guru. You can read any book and
will know what are the statutes of the Lord but guru has to see that
we practice them these statutes are to be practiced
To brought into your own life which is difficult
And without a guru or correcting force it's very difficult
to follow these statutes of Lord, because there is a gap between human awareness and divine
awareness. A very big gap! And that cap can be only fulfilled by a guru who himself
he's complete today it' s Puneemadi. Puneema means the complete moon. The Guru has
be a complete personality to talk about these statutes and elevate his disciples
through this level of understanding by which they imbibe those statutes. He is there
to fulfill the gap, for that it's essential every Guru has
be a realized soul of very high quality and greatly evolved.
He need not the person who is an ascetic or he needs to know that there are persons living
in forest, they could become common householder ,he can became king all these outward manifestations
of one's life do not matter. Whatever may be your position, I would say the so-called
position in this world makes no difference to you being a guru as long
As You have imbibed The Statutes Of The Lord." Again i say that you
have to imbibe the statutes. Let's see what are the statutes? First is, you do not harm
anyone! Principle it that we're not to harm anybody. Animals too harm without knowing
they doing harm if You go near a snake He'll bite If a scorpion Is there he can put his
poison into your being. Animals are not to harm anyone, they can correct but
do not harm so the principle of not harming was taken
through a very-very point where reality disappeared
for example when it was said Do Not Harm Anyone

We will not harm bugs and kill them

in which they preserve mosquitos
This is absurdity
Taking anything to absurdities cannot be reality
First ofall
We should not harm anyone who is walking in the path of God,
The one Who Is a Realized Soul.
He may be wrong there maybe some mistakes in him still he needs correction
Nobody's perfect as yet so do no harm always try to help
Secondly anybody that is real seeker
He may be wrong. He might have gone to the wrong gurus, he might've done wrong things

You're having mislead before so more sympathies that's why
if your mistakes in away is good because we all more sympathy for such people

Any emotional upsetting just for harm's sake.
For correction is all right

On your own legs and know
That here one with the truth

You know what is and cannot compromise with falsehood ,you can not . For

You stand up
Say

we been able To See

but For THAT
